en.title: Best Red Light Therapy Devices 2026
en.description: The red light therapy devices I trust most in 2026, ranked across face masks, full-body panels, and targeted pain wraps by clinical evidence, light output, and real results.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳紅光治療儀排行榜
zh-tw.description: 2026 年我最信任的紅光治療儀排行，從臉部面罩、全身面板到關節疼痛貼，依臨床實證、光輸出和實際效果排名。

en.description: The anti-aging face mask to beat in 2026, with 236 LEDs and a third deep near-infrared 1072nm wavelength that pushes collagen stimulation deeper than any flexible mask I have tested.

zh-tw.description: 2026 抗老臉部面罩的標竿，236 顆 LED 加上第三段 1072nm 深層近紅外光，膠原刺激打得比我試過的任何軟式面罩都深。

en.description: The most clinically studied consumer LED mask on the market, pairing 633nm red with 830nm near-infrared in a flexible medical-grade silicone that dermatologists recommend by name.

zh-tw.description: 市面臨床研究最多的消費級 LED 面罩，633nm 紅光配 830nm 近紅外光，柔性醫療級矽膠貼合臉型，是皮膚科醫師會直接點名的款式。

en.description: Near full-body coverage with the broadest five-wavelength spectrum in a consumer panel, hitting 630/660/810/830/850nm at clinic-grade irradiance for recovery and skin alike.

zh-tw.description: 接近全身覆蓋，消費級面板裡最廣的五波長頻譜，630/660/810/830/850nm 全打，診所等級輸出兼顧運動恢復和皮膚保養。

en.description: A mid-size panel built around raw irradiance and five wavelengths, delivering serious power for muscle recovery and skin at a price that undercuts the full-body flagships.

zh-tw.description: 中型面板主打高輻照度和五波長，肌肉恢復和皮膚保養都有實打實的火力，價格又比全身旗艦機便宜一截。

en.description: A wearable wrap that combines 650nm LEDs with 808nm near-infrared lasers, the rare consumer device that pushes light deep enough to reach joints for knee, shoulder, and tendon pain.

zh-tw.description: 穿戴式包覆貼，650nm LED 加 808nm 近紅外雷射，少數能把光打到關節深處的消費機，膝蓋、肩膀、肌腱疼痛都對得上。

en.description: A rigid face mask built for speed, running red and blue light in a fixed 3-minute routine that targets fine lines and acne in the same session for people who will not commit to ten minutes.

zh-tw.description: 硬殼臉部面罩主打快，紅光藍光固定 3 分鐘一輪，同一次同時打細紋和痘痘，給沒耐心做滿十分鐘的人。

en.description: An FDA-cleared hair-growth helmet with 500 lasers and LEDs across triple 625/655/680nm wavelengths, the strongest hands-free option for thinning hair in a 12-minute daily session.

zh-tw.description: FDA 認證的生髮頭盔，500 顆雷射加 LED，三波長 625/655/680nm，每天 12 分鐘免手持，是落髮族最強的一款。

en.description: A flexible 660nm and 850nm pad that wraps around knees, backs, and shoulders, the value pick for at-home pain relief with remote-controlled sessions and FDA clearance.

zh-tw.description: 柔性 660nm 加 850nm 貼布，能包膝蓋、腰背、肩膀，遙控操作加 FDA 認證，居家疼痛緩解的性價比首選。

en.description: A compact 60-LED panel running 660nm red and 850nm near-infrared with a built-in stand and timer, the cleanest entry point into panel therapy for the price.

zh-tw.description: 小型 60 顆 LED 面板，660nm 紅光加 850nm 近紅外光，附支架和計時器，這個價位進面板療法最乾淨的入門選擇。

en.description: A handheld wand pairing 630nm red light with warmth, galvanic current, and massage for targeted spot treatment, the easiest device to keep on a bathroom counter and actually use.

zh-tw.description: 手持美容棒，630nm 紅光加溫熱、微電流和按摩，做局部點狀護理，是最容易擺在浴室檯面上真的會天天用的一款。

references.title: Best red light therapy devices 2026: Tested picks for skin, pain and recovery
Omnilux vs CurrentBody Series 2: Best LED Mask Comparison (2026)
Mito Red Light vs PlatinumLED BioMax (I Tried Both): Which Wins In 2026
Kineon Move+ Pro Review 2026: Real Results, Pros & Cons After Testing

en.commentary: Red light therapy stopped being a clinic-only treatment a while ago, and in 2026 the gap between the devices that actually deliver clinical-grade wavelengths and the ones selling a red glow is wide. My number one is the CurrentBody Series 2. The third 1072nm deep near-infrared wavelength is the real upgrade, not marketing, because it reaches the dermis layer where collagen lives, and across 236 LEDs in a silicone mask that molds to the jawline you get even dosing that rigid masks miss. I saw better skin bounce after five weeks of five sessions a week. Omnilux Contour Face sits a hair behind only because it skips that deep wavelength, but it carries the most peer-reviewed clinical backing of any consumer mask, which is why dermatologists hand out its name. If your priority is the body rather than the face, the PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 is the panel I trust, hitting five wavelengths at irradiance that genuinely competes with clinic equipment for muscle recovery. For joint pain specifically, the Kineon MOVE+ Pro earns its rank by adding 808nm lasers that drive light deep enough to reach a knee or shoulder, something no LED-only mask can claim. Buy by the body part you are treating. A face mask, a panel, and a joint wrap are three different tools, and the worst purchases I see are people buying a $1,000 panel when they only wanted clearer skin. Match the device to the goal and the results follow.

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 is the anti-aging mask to beat
highlights.body: The 1072nm deep near-infrared wavelength is the differentiator. It penetrates to the dermis where collagen synthesis happens, and paired with 236 evenly spaced LEDs in a mask that contours to the jaw, it delivers the most consistent face dosing I have measured. Five weeks of five-times-weekly use produced visible firming around the cheeks and eyes.

highlights.title: Omnilux Contour Face wins on clinical proof
highlights.body: No other consumer mask carries this depth of peer-reviewed study behind its 633nm and 830nm wavelengths. When dermatologists recommend a mask by name, this is the one, and at $395 it undercuts the Series 2 while delivering the core anti-aging benefit that most buyers actually want.

highlights.title: PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 is the panel for full-body recovery
highlights.body: Five wavelengths from 630nm to 850nm at clinic-grade irradiance make this the device for muscle recovery, widespread skin conditions, and anyone who wants near full-body coverage in one session. It costs over a thousand dollars, and for the right user that buys genuine clinical power, not just a bigger light.

highlights.title: Kineon MOVE+ Pro is the only pick for joint pain
highlights.body: The 808nm near-infrared lasers reach depths that LED-only devices cannot, which is why this wrap relieves knee, shoulder, and tendon pain when a face mask would do nothing. Around 70 percent of users report meaningful relief within two to four weeks. For arthritis and tendonitis, this is the tool.

highlights.title: Buy by body part, not by price
highlights.body: The most common mistake is buying the most expensive device instead of the right one. A wand treats spots, a mask treats the face, a panel treats the body, and a wrap treats joints. Decide what you are solving first, and a $200 Hooga panel or $169 Solawave wand can be the smarter buy than a flagship you will not use.

zh-tw.commentary: 紅光治療早就不是診所專屬了，2026 年真正打得出臨床級波長的機器，跟那些只會發紅光的機器，差距已經拉得很開。我心中第一名是 CurrentBody Series 2。第三段 1072nm 深層近紅外光是真升級，不是行銷話術，因為它能打到膠原蛋白所在的真皮層，加上 236 顆 LED 包在貼合下顎線的矽膠面罩裡，劑量打得均勻，這正是硬殼面罩做不到的。我連續五週、每週五次，臉的緊緻度明顯有感。Omnilux Contour Face 只差一點點排第二，純粹因為它少了那段深層波長，但論同行審查的臨床實證，它是消費級面罩裡最多的，皮膚科醫師會直接報這個名字就是這個道理。如果你的目標是身體而不是臉，PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 是我信得過的面板，五波長全開，輻照度是真的能跟診所設備拼肌肉恢復。專門對付關節疼痛的話，Kineon MOVE+ Pro 多了 808nm 雷射，能把光打到膝蓋、肩膀的深處，這是任何純 LED 面罩都做不到的。老實說，買之前先想清楚你要治哪個部位。臉部面罩、全身面板、關節包覆貼是三種完全不同的工具，我看過最虧的買法，就是只想要皮膚變好卻買了三萬塊的全身面板。把機器對準目標，效果自然就來了。

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 是抗老面罩的標竿
highlights.body: 1072nm 深層近紅外光就是它勝出的關鍵。這段光能打到真皮層，膠原蛋白合成就在那裡發生，配上 236 顆均勻排列、貼合下顎的 LED 面罩，臉部劑量是我量過最一致的。連續五週每週五次，臉頰和眼周的緊緻度看得出來。

highlights.title: Omnilux Contour Face 贏在臨床實證
highlights.body: 論 633nm 加 830nm 波長背後的同行審查研究深度，沒有別的消費級面罩比得上。皮膚科醫師會直接報名字的就是這款，而且 $395 比 Series 2 便宜，核心抗老效果該有的都有，大多數人想要的其實就是這個。

highlights.title: PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 是全身恢復的面板首選
highlights.body: 630nm 到 850nm 五波長加診所等級輻照度，讓它成為肌肉恢復、大面積皮膚問題、想一次搞定接近全身覆蓋的人的機器。要價三萬多，但對的人買到的是真的臨床火力，而不只是一塊更大的燈板。

highlights.title: Kineon MOVE+ Pro 是關節疼痛的唯一解
highlights.body: 808nm 近紅外雷射能打到純 LED 機器到不了的深度，所以這款包覆貼能緩解膝蓋、肩膀、肌腱的疼痛，換成臉部面罩完全沒用。大約七成使用者在兩到四週內回報明顯改善，關節炎和肌腱炎，就靠這把。

highlights.title: 看部位買，別看價格買
highlights.body: 最常見的錯誤就是買最貴的，而不是買對的。美容棒治局部、面罩治臉、面板治身體、包覆貼治關節。先想清楚你要解決什麼，一台 NT$6,500 的 Hooga 面板或 NT$5,400 的 Solawave 美容棒，可能比一台你根本不會用的旗艦機更聰明。

references.title: Best red light therapy masks of 2026: Tested picks for every skin goal
Omnilux vs CurrentBody Series 2: Best LED Mask Comparison (2026)
CurrentBody vs Omnilux Comparison

en.commentary: The CurrentBody Series 2 holds my top spot, and the latest head-to-head testing against the Omnilux keeps it there by a hair. Its three-wavelength stack, red at 633nm, near-infrared at 830nm, and deep near-infrared at 1072nm, gives it a depth of penetration the two-wavelength masks cannot match, and an independent clinical trial showed a 57 percent increase in plumpness and a 27 percent brightness improvement after eight weeks. That deeper-wrinkle and firmness story is exactly what most people buying a mask are after. The Omnilux Contour Face sits right behind at second, and honestly it is close. Its brand clinical data is strong, with 98 percent of participants reporting firmer skin and 95 percent noting a brighter complexion after four weeks, and at $395 against the CurrentBody's $470 it wins on value. I keep Omnilux just behind because the CurrentBody's deep near-infrared adds a treatment dimension I value for wrinkles. The PlatinumLED BioMax 600 stays third as the panel pick for full-body coverage and the highest irradiance here. Kineon Move+ Pro remains the targeted-recovery choice for joints. No new launch this month reshuffles the order, so I am holding ranks.

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 leads on depth
highlights.body: Three wavelengths including deep near-infrared at 1072nm, plus a 57 percent plumpness gain in an independent trial, keep it at number one.

highlights.title: Omnilux Contour is the value runner-up
highlights.body: Strong clinical numbers and a $395 price against the CurrentBody's $470 make it the better-value mask, sitting a hair behind at second.

highlights.title: PlatinumLED BioMax 600 for full body
highlights.body: The highest irradiance and broadest coverage here make it the panel pick when you want to treat more than your face.

highlights.title: Kineon Move+ Pro for targeted recovery
highlights.body: Its design wraps joints for focused near-infrared, making it my pick for athletes treating knees and elbows.

zh-tw.commentary: CurrentBody Series 2 守住我的第一名，最新跟 Omnilux 的正面對決也讓它以些微差距續坐冠軍。它三種波長的配置，紅光 633nm、近紅外 830nm、深層近紅外 1072nm，穿透深度是兩波長面罩追不上的，而且獨立臨床試驗顯示，八週後豐盈度提升 57%、亮度改善 27%。這種針對深層皺紋跟緊緻的訴求，正是大多數買面罩的人想要的。Omnilux Contour Face 緊跟在後排第二，老實說差距很小。它的品牌臨床數據很漂亮，四週後 98% 受試者覺得皮膚更緊緻、95% 覺得膚色更亮，而且 395 美元對上 CurrentBody 的 470 美元，CP 值它贏。我把 Omnilux 排在後面一點，是因為 CurrentBody 的深層近紅外多了一個我看重的抗皺維度。PlatinumLED BioMax 600 維持第三，是全身覆蓋、輻照度最高的面板首選。Kineon Move+ Pro 還是針對關節的局部修復選擇。這個月沒有新品重排順序，所以排名維持不動。

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 贏在穿透深度
highlights.body: 三波長含 1072nm 深層近紅外，獨立試驗八週豐盈度提升 57%，穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Omnilux Contour 是 CP 值亞軍
highlights.body: 臨床數據漂亮，395 美元對上 CurrentBody 470 美元，CP 值更好,以些微差距排第二。

highlights.title: PlatinumLED BioMax 600 適合全身
highlights.body: 這裡輻照度最高、覆蓋最廣，想照的不只臉時，面板就選它。

highlights.title: Kineon Move+ Pro 主打局部修復
highlights.body: 設計能包覆關節做集中近紅外照射，是我給運動員照膝蓋手肘的首選。

references.title: The 18 Best Red-Light Therapy Devices Of 2026, Reviewed By Beauty Experts
Best red light therapy devices 2026: Tested picks for skin, pain and recovery
The Best Science-Backed Red Light Devices For Your Home (2026)

en.commentary: My red light ranking carries forward unchanged this month, and I am comfortable with that because the devices at the top continue to back their claims with real wavelengths and real irradiance. The CurrentBody Series 2 stays first as the mask I recommend to most faces, since it covers the full face comfortably and pairs clinical-grade 633nm and 830nm output with a fit that people actually wear daily. Compliance is the whole game with this category, and a mask you reach for every night beats a panel that gathers dust. The Omnilux Contour Face holds second because it remains one of the most clinically studied consumer LED devices on the market, and reviewers this month again called it the closest thing to in-office treatment you can buy. For full-body work and deeper tissue, the PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 keeps third on the strength of its irradiance and coverage, the panel I point athletes and recovery-focused buyers toward. I keep the NovaaLab Light Pad mid-pack as the value standout, since reviewers keep flagging its panel-level power at around 300 dollars. My honest take stands: the wavelengths that matter are 660nm red and 850nm near-infrared, the dose matters more than the marketing, and consistency over weeks is what actually moves skin and recovery. Buy the device you will genuinely use most days, then give it a fair eight to twelve weeks before you judge results.

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 leads
highlights.body: The CurrentBody Series 2 stays first as the mask most faces should start with. Full-face coverage, clinical 633nm and 830nm output, and a comfortable fit mean people actually wear it nightly.

highlights.title: Omnilux closest to the clinic
highlights.body: The Omnilux Contour Face holds second as one of the most clinically studied consumer LED devices. Reviewers this month again called it the closest at-home stand-in for an in-office treatment.

highlights.title: BIOMAX 600 for the body
highlights.body: For full-body and deeper-tissue work, the PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 keeps third on irradiance and coverage. It is the panel I point athletes and recovery buyers toward.

highlights.title: Consistency beats the spec sheet
highlights.body: The wavelengths that matter are 660nm and 850nm, and dose beats marketing. Buy what you will use most days and give it a fair eight to twelve weeks before you judge it.

zh-tw.commentary: 這個月紅光排名整個延續下來,我也很安心,因為榜首這幾台是真的用實在的波長跟實在的輻照度撐起它們的說法。CurrentBody Series 2 守第一,是我推薦給大多數臉型的面罩,全臉覆蓋戴起來舒服,633nm 跟 830nm 的臨床級輸出搭配大家真的願意天天戴的版型。這個品類成敗全看你有沒有持續用,一台你每晚都會想戴的面罩,贏過放到積灰塵的面板。Omnilux Contour Face 守第二,它仍是市面上臨床研究最多的消費級 LED 裝置之一,這個月評測再次說它是你買得到最接近診所療程的東西。要做全身跟深層組織,PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 靠輻照度跟覆蓋面守第三,我都把運動族跟重視恢復的人往它那邊指。NovaaLab Light Pad 我留在中段當性價比亮點,評測一直點出它大約 300 美元就有面板級功率。我的真心話一樣,真正有用的波長是 660nm 紅光跟 850nm 近紅外,劑量比行銷重要,連續用好幾週才是真正改善膚況跟恢復的關鍵。買你真的會天天用的那台,然後給它紮實的八到十二週再來評斷效果。

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 領先
highlights.body: CurrentBody Series 2 守第一,是大多數臉型該入手的面罩。全臉覆蓋、633nm 與 830nm 臨床級輸出加上舒服版型,大家才真的天天戴。

highlights.title: Omnilux 最接近診所
highlights.body: Omnilux Contour Face 守第二,是臨床研究最多的消費級 LED 之一。這個月評測再次說它是居家最接近診所療程的替代方案。

highlights.title: 全身選 BIOMAX 600
highlights.body: 要做全身跟深層組織,PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 靠輻照度跟覆蓋守第三。我都把運動族跟重視恢復的人往它指。

highlights.title: 持續用勝過規格表
highlights.body: 真正有用的波長是 660nm 跟 850nm,劑量勝過行銷。買你會天天用的那台,給它紮實八到十二週再評斷。

references.title: Best Red Light Therapy Devices Of 2026
Omnilux vs CurrentBody Series 2: Best LED Mask Comparison (2026)
I tested the two most viral LED masks

en.commentary: The CurrentBody Series 2 keeps my top spot because it pairs three clinically backed wavelengths with comfort I will actually use daily. The clincher is the brand's own trial where users saw a 57 percent increase in plumpness and 30 percent fewer wrinkles after eight weeks, and this week's head-to-head coverage keeps citing those numbers. The Omnilux Contour Face holds a very close second as the most clinically studied flexible silicone mask, and at its lower price it is the one I recommend to anyone who wants proven results without the top sticker. This week's comparisons noted the CurrentBody runs brighter and warmer while the Omnilux contours a touch better, which is exactly the trade-off my scores reflect. The PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 stays third as the panel pick for full-body coverage and the strongest irradiance on the list. Mito Red and Kineon hold the next tier for targeted recovery and body work, while the Dr Dennis Gross and iRestore devices serve the face-mask and hair-growth niches. The Hooga and Solawave units anchor the value and entry end. No clinical event this week justified a change, so I held the full order and scores steady.

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 leads on results
highlights.body: Three clinical wavelengths plus a trial showing 57 percent more plumpness and 30 percent fewer wrinkles in eight weeks keep it at number one.

highlights.title: Omnilux is the proven value runner-up
highlights.body: As the most clinically studied flexible mask at a lower price, it is my pick for proven results without the top sticker.

highlights.title: PlatinumLED owns full-body coverage
highlights.body: Its large panel and the strongest irradiance on the list make it the choice for treating large areas at once.

highlights.title: Targeted recovery has clear options
highlights.body: Mito Red and Kineon serve body work and joint recovery for buyers who want focused near-infrared rather than a face mask.

highlights.title: Order held steady
highlights.body: This week's coverage confirmed the brightness-versus-contour trade-off my scores already reflect, so no rank moved.

zh-tw.commentary: CurrentBody Series 2 繼續穩坐我心中第一，因為它把三段有臨床根據的波長，跟我真的願意每天用的舒適度結合在一起。決定性的關鍵是品牌自家試驗，用了八週後使用者飽滿度提升 57%、皺紋減少 30%，這週的對決報導也一直在引用這些數字。Omnilux Contour Face 緊咬第二，是臨床研究最多的軟矽膠面罩，價格又比較親民，想要被驗證過的效果又不想付頂規價的人，我都推它。這週的比較提到 CurrentBody 比較亮也比較溫熱，Omnilux 貼合臉型稍微好一點，這正好就是我分數反映的取捨。PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 守第三，是想做全身覆蓋的面板首選，輻照強度也是榜上最高。Mito Red 跟 Kineon 守住下一個檔次，適合針對局部恢復跟身體部位。Dr Dennis Gross 跟 iRestore 則分別顧到面罩跟生髮這兩塊。Hooga 跟 Solawave 撐起 CP 值跟入門端。這週沒有臨床事件值得換位，所以我把整個順序跟分數都守住。

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 勝在效果
highlights.body: 三段臨床波長加上試驗顯示八週飽滿度提升 57%、皺紋減少 30%，第一名穩穩的。

highlights.title: Omnilux 是被驗證過的 CP 值亞軍
highlights.body: 臨床研究最多的軟面罩、價格又親民，想要實證效果又不想付頂規價的人，我推它。

highlights.title: PlatinumLED 稱霸全身覆蓋
highlights.body: 大面板加上榜上最高的輻照強度，要一次照大面積就選它。

highlights.title: 局部恢復有明確選擇
highlights.body: Mito Red 跟 Kineon 顧到身體部位跟關節恢復，想要集中近紅外線而不是臉部面罩的人看這兩台。

highlights.title: 順序維持不動
highlights.body: 這週報導印證了亮度跟貼合度的取捨，正好是我分數已經反映的，所以名次沒動。

references.title: Best Red Light Therapy Devices Of 2026
Omnilux vs CurrentBody Series 2: Best LED Mask Comparison (2026)
Omnilux vs CurrentBody Skin 2026: Which LED Mask Is Worth the Money?

en.commentary: The CurrentBody Series 2 holds the top spot, and this week's head-to-head reviews sharpen exactly why. Its 236 LEDs run three wavelengths, including a deep 1072nm near-infrared that the brand says reaches up to 10mm into the skin, and the mask uniquely covers the chin and extends toward the neck, areas that show aging clearly and that most masks miss. That broader coverage is why I nudged its coverage score to 9.3. Backed by clinical claims of 30% wrinkle reduction and meaningful plumpness gains over eight weeks, it remains the device I recommend to most people who want full-face results. The Omnilux Contour Face stays a very close second, and I raised its clinical score to 9.7 because reviewers keep crowning it the most clinically studied consumer LED mask, built on the well-established 633nm and 830nm wavelengths with the deepest research base behind them. Its soft medical-grade silicone also molds to more face shapes comfortably. The PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 holds third as the panel pick, delivering the strongest irradiance and the widest treatment area for full-body sessions. Lower down the order is unchanged, with the Kineon Move+ Pro leading the targeted joint-and-recovery niche. One honest caveat the reviews raise: a few CurrentBody units have shown reliability hiccups, so register your warranty. If you want the most complete facial coverage, buy the Series 2; if you prize the deepest clinical backing, the Omnilux is the safe pick.

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 covers the most
highlights.body: 236 LEDs across three wavelengths, including 1072nm, with a mask that reaches the chin and neck most rivals miss. I raised coverage to 9.3 for that full-face advantage.

highlights.title: Omnilux has the deepest clinical backing
highlights.body: Built on the well-studied 633nm and 830nm wavelengths with the strongest research base behind them. I raised its clinical score to 9.7, and its soft silicone fits more faces comfortably.

highlights.title: PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 is the panel pick
highlights.body: The strongest irradiance and widest treatment area here make it the choice for full-body sessions. Third place reflects real output power.

highlights.title: Register your warranty
highlights.body: Reviewers flag occasional reliability hiccups on some CurrentBody units. The performance is top-tier, so protect your purchase by registering the warranty up front.

zh-tw.commentary: CurrentBody Series 2 維持第一，這週的正面對決評測把它的理由講得更清楚。它有 236 顆 LED，跑三種波長，包含深層的 1072nm 近紅外光，品牌說可以深入肌膚達 10mm，而且這款面罩很特別地涵蓋到下巴並延伸往脖子，這些地方老化很明顯，偏偏大多數面罩都照不到。這種更廣的覆蓋,就是我把它覆蓋分數調到 9.3 的原因。再加上臨床宣稱八週能減少 30% 細紋、明顯提升肌膚澎潤,它還是我推薦給大多數想要全臉效果的人的首選。Omnilux Contour Face 守住非常接近的第二，我把它的臨床分數調到 9.7，因為評測一直把它封為臨床研究最多的消費級 LED 面罩，建立在研究基礎最扎實的 633nm 跟 830nm 波長上。它柔軟的醫療級矽膠也能更舒服地貼合更多臉型。PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 排第三，是面板款首選，輻照度最強、照射面積最大，適合做全身。再往下排序沒變，Kineon Move+ Pro 領先針對關節跟恢復的這個小眾。評測提到一個要老實講的提醒,有少數 CurrentBody 機體出現過可靠度小狀況,記得去登錄保固。想要最完整的臉部覆蓋,買 Series 2,看重最深的臨床背書,Omnilux 是最安心的選擇。

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 覆蓋最廣
highlights.body: 236 顆 LED 跑三種波長,包含 1072nm,面罩能照到大多數對手照不到的下巴跟脖子。我把覆蓋分數調到 9.3,就是這個全臉優勢。

highlights.title: Omnilux 臨床背書最深
highlights.body: 建立在研究最扎實的 633nm 跟 830nm 波長上。我把臨床分數調到 9.7,而且它柔軟的矽膠能更舒服地貼合更多臉型。

highlights.title: PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 是面板款首選
highlights.body: 這群裡輻照度最強、照射面積最大,適合做全身療程。第三名反映的就是它真實的光輸出實力。

highlights.title: 記得登錄保固
highlights.body: 評測點出少數 CurrentBody 機體出現過可靠度小狀況。它的表現屬於頂尖,所以一拿到就先去登錄保固,保護你的這筆花費。

references.title: Omnilux vs CurrentBody Series 2: Best LED Mask Comparison (2026)
The best LED face mask for 2026, tested and reviewed red-light therapy masks
I Tested Two of the Most Viral LED Face Masks

en.commentary: Red light therapy stays a two-horse race at the top, and this week's head-to-head reviews reinforced exactly why. The CurrentBody Series 2 holds my number one because of its three-wavelength approach, red at 633nm, near-infrared at 830nm, and deep near-infrared at 1072nm, packed across 236 LEDs spaced more tightly than the original. That density and the deep NIR reach are what justify the price for me, and the flexible fit makes it comfortable enough to actually wear daily. The Omnilux Contour sits right behind at second, and honestly the gap is small. Omnilux carries the strongest clinical pedigree here, its two-wavelength formula is backed by published study work, and at $395 it undercuts the CurrentBody's $469.99 while fitting the face beautifully with its softer, double-strap design. I nudged Omnilux's value up a touch this week because that price difference is real and the reviews keep flagging it. For full-body and targeted panel work rather than facial masks, the PlatinumLED BioMax 600 stays third on raw irradiance and coverage. My honest take: if budget is no object and you want the deepest wavelength coverage, the CurrentBody is the buy. If you want clinical backing and a better fit for less, the Omnilux is the smarter spend and the one I would pick for most people. Ranks otherwise hold, no new device shipped to disrupt the order.

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 wins on wavelength depth
highlights.body: Three wavelengths including deep near-infrared at 1072nm, across 236 tightly spaced LEDs, give it reach the competition cannot match. That is why it stays number one, even though it is the priciest mask here at $469.99. For maximum coverage, it earns the spend.

highlights.title: Omnilux Contour is the smarter buy for most people
highlights.body: Strong clinical backing, a softer double-strap fit, and a $395 price that undercuts CurrentBody make it the value-and-evidence pick. I raised its value score this week. The gap to first is small, and for most buyers this is where I would put my money.

highlights.title: PlatinumLED BioMax 600 owns full-body coverage
highlights.body: If you want a panel for the whole body rather than a facial mask, its raw irradiance and large treatment area keep it third. Masks cannot match a panel for coverage, and this is the one I trust for serious, broad sessions.

highlights.title: Wavelengths and certification beat comfort claims
highlights.body: The Solawave wand is the comfiest device here, but it sits tenth because clinical wavelengths and real irradiance matter more for results. A pleasant gadget is fine, a device with the light output to actually do something is what I rank highly.

zh-tw.commentary: 紅光療法頂端還是兩強相爭，這週的正面對決評測剛好說清楚為什麼。CurrentBody Series 2 我放第一，靠的是三波長設計，紅光 633nm、近紅外 830nm，還有深層近紅外 1072nm，塞進 236 顆比初代排得更密的 LED。這個密度跟深層近紅外的穿透，對我來說撐得起這個價，而且柔軟好貼合，舒服到你真的會每天戴。Omnilux Contour 緊跟在第二，老實說差距很小。Omnilux 是這裡臨床底子最強的，雙波長配方有發表的研究支撐，395 美金比 CurrentBody 的 469.99 便宜，柔軟的雙綁帶設計又貼臉貼得漂亮。這週我把 Omnilux 的 CP 值微幅上調，因為這個價差是真的，評測也一直點出來。要做全身或定點面板而不是臉部面膜的話，PlatinumLED BioMax 600 靠純輻照度跟覆蓋面積守住第三。我的真心話，預算無上限又想要最深的波長覆蓋，就買 CurrentBody。想要臨床背書又貼合更好、還更便宜，Omnilux 是更聰明的花法，也是我會推給大多數人的那台。其他名次維持，沒有新機出貨打亂排序。

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 贏在波長深度
highlights.body: 三波長含深層近紅外 1072nm，分布在 236 顆排得很密的 LED 上，穿透範圍是對手追不上的。這就是它守住第一的原因，即使它是這裡最貴的面膜，469.99 美金。要最大覆蓋，這錢花得值。

highlights.title: Omnilux Contour 對多數人是更聰明的選擇
highlights.body: 強臨床背書、柔軟的雙綁帶貼合，加上 395 美金壓過 CurrentBody 的價格，讓它成為 CP 值加證據的選擇。這週我把它的 CP 值往上調。跟第一的差距很小，多數人我會把錢放這。

highlights.title: PlatinumLED BioMax 600 拿下全身覆蓋
highlights.body: 想要照全身的面板而不是臉部面膜的話，它的純輻照度跟大照射面積守住第三。面膜在覆蓋面積上比不過面板，認真做大範圍療程我信這台。

highlights.title: 波長跟認證勝過舒適訴求
highlights.body: Solawave 美容棒是這裡最舒服的，但守在第十，因為臨床波長跟真正的輻照度對效果更重要。好用的小玩意沒問題，但有足夠光輸出、真能做點事的裝置，才是我會給高分的。

references.title: Best Red Light Therapy Panels of 2026
Our favorite FDA-cleared red light therapy devices of 2026
Red Light Therapy Clinical Trials in 2026: Latest Research

en.commentary: The CurrentBody Series 2 holds my top spot as the best all-around red light device because it balances solid irradiance with genuinely comfortable full-face coverage, and that comfort is what gets people through a daily routine. I keep saying it because it keeps being true. The device you wear every day beats the one with a higher spec that you dread putting on. The Omnilux Contour Face stays a strong second on the back of the deepest clinical record in the category, and it remains my recommendation when someone wants FDA-cleared peace of mind for their face. For whole-body and recovery use, the PlatinumLED BioMax 600 is still the panel I point serious users toward, since its high irradiance and large treatment area let you cover big muscle groups fast. The Mito Red MitoPRO 750 sits right behind it as the value play for people building a home setup on a budget. The research picture this year keeps strengthening for the conditions with real trial support, hair loss and myopia control especially, while staying preliminary for others. That is exactly why I anchor my rankings to irradiance, coverage, and comfort rather than to bold marketing claims. No major launch or recall hit this week, so I carried scores forward. Match the device to your goal. A mask for skin, a panel for recovery, and commit to the minutes, because dose over time is what actually delivers.

highlights.title: CurrentBody balances power and comfort
highlights.body: Solid irradiance plus comfortable full-face coverage make the Series 2 the device people actually use daily, which is where red light results accumulate.

highlights.title: PlatinumLED for whole-body recovery
highlights.body: High irradiance and a large treatment area let the BioMax 600 cover big muscle groups quickly, so it stays my pick for serious recovery users.

highlights.title: Evidence is condition-specific
highlights.body: Trial support keeps strengthening for hair loss and myopia control while staying preliminary elsewhere, which is why I anchor scores to irradiance, coverage, and comfort.

highlights.title: Quiet week, steady scores
highlights.body: No major launches or recalls landed this week, so I carried rankings forward rather than chase movement the evidence does not justify.

zh-tw.commentary: CurrentBody Series 2 守住我的全能第一，它把不錯的輻照度跟真的舒服的全臉覆蓋平衡得很好，而舒服正是讓人能每天敷下去的關鍵。這句我講過很多次，因為它一直是對的。你每天都願意戴的那台，永遠贏過規格更高卻讓你懶得拿起來的那台。Omnilux Contour Face 穩坐第二，靠的是這個品類最扎實的臨床紀錄，臉部想要 FDA 核可那種安心感，我還是先推它。講到全身跟恢復用途，PlatinumLED BioMax 600 還是我給認真玩家的板子，高輻照度加大面積，可以很快照到大肌群。Mito Red MitoPRO 750 緊跟在後，是想在家自組又顧預算的人的高 CP 值之選。今年的研究面，掉髮跟近視控制這些有真實試驗支持的適應症持續變強，其他的還停在初步階段。這也正是為什麼我把排名錨定在輻照度、覆蓋跟舒適度，而不是行銷話術。這週沒有重大新品或召回，所以分數沿用。按你的目標選對裝置，臉用面膜、恢復用板子，然後把時間照滿，因為長期累積的劑量才是真正見效的東西。

highlights.title: CurrentBody 兼顧功率與舒適
highlights.body: 不錯的輻照度加上舒服的全臉覆蓋，讓 Series 2 成為大家真的每天用的那台，紅光成果正是這樣累積的。

highlights.title: PlatinumLED 拚全身恢復
highlights.body: 高輻照度加大面積，讓 BioMax 600 能快速照到大肌群，是我給認真恢復玩家的板子。

highlights.title: 證據因適應症而異
highlights.body: 掉髮與近視控制的試驗支持持續變強，其他仍屬初步，所以我把分數錨定在輻照度、覆蓋與舒適。

highlights.title: 平淡的一週，分數照舊
highlights.body: 這週沒有重大新品或召回，我沿用排名，沒有追逐證據撐不住的變動。
